query: SELECT id, COALESCE(LENGTH(transcript), 0) as transcript_len, COALESCE(LENGTH(CAST(transcriptSegments AS CHAR)), 0) as segments_len, COALESCE(LENGTH(CAST(neurovendasAnalysis AS CHAR)), 0) as analysis_len, callStatus FROM calls WHERE id = 150001;
